concerns: Platform-native enforcement paths still need deeper runtime validation.
Release signing and installer distribution remain placeholder-level.
followUpTasks: Expand runtime integration coverage for session-aware checkpoint restore behavior.
Add platform-runner behavioral tests for Windows, Linux, and macOS enforcement paths.
Operationalize code-signing and release secret management.
strengths: Green build and test validation across the solution.
Coherent architecture split across core, daemon, CLI, events, proxy, MCP, and platform projects.
Documentation, checkpointing, and packaging scaffolding are now present and consistent.
result.verdict: Approved with follow-up work focused on platform-native hardening and release operationalization.
